content:
INTELLIGENCE BRIEFING — Thu, 19 Feb 2026 00:35:54 GMT
Overall Threat Level: CRITICAL
Total Events: 320 | Critical: 27 | High: 63 | Medium: 189 | Low: 41

CRITICAL ALERTS:
  [MIDDLE EAST] White House says Iran would be ‘wise’ to take deal amid military buildup (Al Jazeera)
  [GLOBAL] Martial law, protests and a president tried for insurrection: How did South Korea get here? (BBC World)
  [UKRAINE] Police detain suspect who helped draft-age men depart abroad for $12,000 in Kharkiv (Ukrinform)
  [MIDDLE EAST] ❗️ In Israel, the highest level of readiness has been declared, and all services have received orders to be ready for war with Iran, according to "N12" (CYPERSPEC Air/UAV [tg:air_defense])
  [UKRAINE] A member of a special forces gang was sentenced to nine years in prison for three murders (ASTRA Independent [tg:ru_milblog])

REGIONAL ASSESSMENT:
  Middle East (81 events, 8 critical, 6 high):
    - Israeli troops raid Hebron, nab suspects for questioning after reports of gunfire
    - White House says Iran would be ‘wise’ to take deal amid military buildup
    - US is withdrawing all 1,000 troops from Syria: WSJ report
  Ukraine/Russia (91 events, 6 critical, 29 high):
    - Police detain suspect who helped draft-age men depart abroad for $12,000 in Kharkiv
    - War update: 201 clashes on front line, nearly half on Huliaipole in Pokrovsk sectors
    - A member of a special forces gang was sentenced to nine years in prison for three murders
  Europe (13 events, 5 critical, 4 high):
    - The VSU has once again targeted the energy infrastructure in Belgorod
    - In Belgorod and its surrounding areas, another blackout occurred as a result of another missile attack
    - ‼️ 🇷🇺 ❤️ “Welcome to a new life
  Global (70 events, 4 critical, 12 high):
    - Martial law, protests and a president tried for insurrection: How did South Korea get here?
    - Press Release: Congresswoman Betty McCollum Calls for Accountability from DoD Over El Paso Airspace Closure - Quiver Quantitative
    - Lawmakers request Pentagon briefing on El Paso airspace closure - Stars and Stripes

Sources: GDELT, Financial Times, Times of Israel, BBC World, SCMP, Al Jazeera, Jerusalem Post, Guardian Middle East, Ukrinform, Defense News, Military Times, Supernova+ [tg:ua_osint], ASTRA Independent [tg:ru_milblog], TFR/Airspace Closure News, Breaking Defense, CYPERSPEC Air/UAV [tg:air_defense], NYT Middle East, NYT World, The War Zone, USNI News, Foreign Policy, DoD News, Google News Reuters World, Operatyvnyi ZSU [tg:ua_osint], Colonelcassad [tg:ru_milblog], Washington Post World, War on the Rocks, Guardian Ukraine, Google News Middle East, Defense One, MilInfoLive [tg:ru_milblog], Kalibrated Analysis [tg:satellite], Ukrainska Pravda, Two Majors [tg:ru_milblog], RV Voenkor [tg:ru_milblog], Google News Kyiv Independent, Google News Reuters Ukraine, Google News Reuters ME, Google News Reuters Africa, Defence Blog, The Diplomat, Azov Brigade [tg:ua_frontline], Long War Journal, Ukrainian Witness [tg:air_defense], Readovka [tg:ru_milblog], Google News Ukraine, Google News CENTCOM, SBU Security Service [tg:ua_intel], WarGonzo [tg:ru_milblog], Rybar [tg:ru_milblog], Turned on War [tg:ru_milblog], War Translated [tg:en_analysis], Military Summary [tg:en_analysis], Voenkor Kotenok [tg:ru_milblog], ATESH Partisan Movement [tg:ua_intel], The GeoSight [tg:satellite]
